verdict: FAIL: uncapped median 17.1ms not < 16.67ms -> cap NOT broken; no frame-time number is valid.
_capture_note: Run on the GPU host (aimez-gpu-capture, Tesla T4) inside the batched BSWR host window via scripts/perf/client_tier_frametime.sh --smoke. The harness exits non-zero by design when subRefreshProven is false, so the driver's auto-save was skipped; this is the verbatim host stdout JSON. ADV-3 outcome: the Linux/Xvfb/T4 host does NOT make --disable-gpu-vsync / --disable-frame-rate-limit free-run the trivial-page rAF below one refresh; it clamps at ~16.67ms exactly like pure headless. Option-1 vsync-quantised over-budget oracle stands as the primary method; no bonus sub-refresh numbers.
